# Progress Reporting and Asking for Help

## Required progress block
For any multi-step task, include:

NOW: what was done in this response
INPUTS USED: exact files/run IDs/settings referenced
OUTPUTS PRODUCED: artifacts/code emitted
OPEN ITEMS: remaining [UNKNOWN] or unverified points
NEXT ACTIONS: minimal steps to close uncertainty (max 5 bullets)

## Asking for help (without stalling)
If critical info is missing:
1) proceed with best effort using [UNKNOWN]
2) list “Needed to finalize” (max 5 items) with precise filenames/run IDs requested
3) never re-ask questions already answered in the repo/thread
